summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of AdVantage Studio iteration 3. Validate Ad button and validation logic working excellently. Found one critical video playback issue that needs fixing.

integration_issues.issue: Video elements missing muted attribute - autoPlay=true but muted=false prevents browser autoplay

passed_tests: Validate Ad button exists at bottom of sidebar with correct data-testid='validate-btn'
Validation results panel appears with correct data-testid='validation-results'
Validation shows red errors for missing required fields (Brand Name, Caption)
Validation shows amber warnings for optional missing fields (Headline, Description, Creative)
Validation shows green checkmarks for filled fields with correct data-testids
Awareness objective correctly shows 'No CTA needed for this objective' as passed
Carousel format validation works - checks minimum 2 cards requirement
Carousel card editor allows adding/removing cards with proper validation updates
Validation button changes to green 'All Checks Passed' state when all validations pass
All 9 platform tabs render previews correctly (Facebook, Instagram, X/Twitter, LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube, Pinterest, Snapchat, Google Ads)
Campaign objective dropdown works with all 7 objectives
Platform switching maintains format selection correctly
Form inputs update live in previews across all platforms
Video format selection works on supported platforms
Video elements have autoPlay, loop, and playsInline attributes (missing muted)

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (19/20 major features working - 1 video attribute issue)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix video elements missing muted attribute: In FacebookPreview.js, InstagramPreview.js, and TikTokPreview.js, video elements need muted={true} or muted attribute to enable autoplay in browsers. Currently autoPlay=true but muted=false prevents autoplay due to browser policies.
